subject: session date
fact: The session took place on May 10th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: May 10th, 2026

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: A Mezzaloth lashed out at Daein with a trident but every strike sailed wide.
source_quote: The cruel Yugoloth lashed out at Daein with its trident... yet every strike sailed wide

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: The Mezzaloth vanished and reappeared across the battlefield to avoid Bramgrim's protective spirits.
source_quote: Unwilling to linger within range of Bramgrim's protective spirits, the creature vanished in an instant and reappeared across the battlefield

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: The Mezzaloth conjured a suffocating cloud of poisonous yellow-green fog.
source_quote: a suffocating cloud of poisonous yellow-green fog conjured by the Mezzaloth

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim's concentration broke under the assault, causing his protective spirits to dissolve.
source_quote: Bramgrim, whose concentration finally broke under the relentless assault, causing his protective spirits to dissolve into nothing

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim summoned a floating spectral weapon to keep fighting.
source_quote: He pushed through the pain, summoning a floating spectral weapon to keep fighting

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim attempted to clear the toxic fog with a burst of dispelling magic but failed.
source_quote: attempted to clear the toxic fog with a burst of dispelling magic — but the cloud held

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim managed to heal the battered Owlbear.
source_quote: Bramgrim managed to heal the battered Owlbear

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur maintained concentration on an invisible Wall of Force between the party and enemy forces.
source_quote: Felkur who quietly bore the greatest burden of all, maintaining his concentration on the invisible Wall of Force

subject: Daein
fact: Daein used a moment's respite to catch his breath and recover his strength.
source_quote: Daein used a moment's respite to catch his breath and recover his strength

subject: fire bolt
fact: Bramgrim hurled a bolt of fire at the Mezzaloth.
source_quote: Bramgrim hurled a bolt of fire at the Mezzaloth

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: The Mezzaloth staggered from the fire bolt and the impact scattered the poisonous cloud.
source_quote: The creature, resistant to flame though it was, still staggered from the blow, and the impact was enough to scatter the poisonous cloud at last

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: The Mezzaloth attempted to shatter the Wall of Force with dispelling magic but failed.
source_quote: attempted to shatter the Wall of Force with a burst of dispelling magic — and failed

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: The Mezzaloth teleported away in desperation.
source_quote: It teleported away in desperation

subject: Mezzaloth death
fact: Daein cut the Mezzaloth down before it could escape.
source_quote: Daein was already moving, cutting the creature down before it could escape

subject: Apprentice Arcanaloth
fact: Three Apprentice Arcanaloths emerged in the chaos screaming for reinforcements.
source_quote: Three Apprentice Arcanaloths had emerged in the chaos, screaming for reinforcements

subject: Fire Giant
fact: Two enormous Fire Giants came hauling themselves over the wall.
source_quote: two enormous Fire Giants came hauling themselves over the wall

subject: Fire Giant attacks
fact: The Fire Giants hurled themselves at Daein and missed every single strike.
source_quote: the giants hurled themselves at Daein again and again, and again and again, they missed — every single strike falling short

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: A second Mezzaloth arrived carrying a wand crackling with disintegrating energy.
source_quote: a second Mezzaloth arrived carrying a wand crackling with disintegrating energy

subject: wand of disintegration
fact: A second Mezzaloth pressed a wand crackling with disintegrating energy against the Wall of Force.
source_quote: pressed the wand against the Wall of Force

subject: Wall of Force destruction
fact: The Wall of Force barrier ceased to exist after being pressed by the wand.
source_quote: the barrier that had protected the party for five brutal rounds simply ceased to exist

subject: Apprentice Arcanaloth
fact: One of the Apprentice Arcanaloths unleashed a roaring fireball that engulfed the entire party.
source_quote: one of the Apprentice Arcanaloths unleashed a roaring fireball that engulfed the entire party

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur maintained concentration on the Wall of Force despite the fireball and other assaults.
source_quote: Felkur, who had held his concentration through poison, fire, and the relentless pressure of battle, held it still

subject: party teleportation
fact: The party teleported away leaving the Mezzaloth's corpse and a furious army behind.
source_quote: The party seized their moment and teleported away, leaving the Mezzaloth's corpse and a furious army behind them

subject: Sporedome
fact: The party materialized in Sporedome.
source_quote: They materialized in Sporedome

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak rushed out to greet the party.
source_quote: Solom Ned'razak and Xaven Tanor'this rushed out to greet them

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this rushed out to greet the party.
source_quote: Solom Ned'razak and Xaven Tanor'this rushed out to greet them

subject: Brandyr
fact: Drow assistants took custody of Brandyr, the captured Fire Giant.
source_quote: Drow assistants carefully took custody of Brandyr, the captured Fire Giant

subject: Fire Giant ritual
fact: Brandyr was moved to a nearby chamber to begin a ritual Solom had long prepared.
source_quote: moved the enormous creature to a nearby chamber to begin the ritual Solom had long prepared

subject: ritual duration
fact: The ritual to process Brandyr would take ten days to complete.
source_quote: explained that the process would take ten days to complete

subject: party decision
fact: The party decided to stay in Sporedome instead of returning to Hillsfar.
source_quote: they decided to stay in Sporedome instead

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Solom assured the party he would remain in contact through Murssvayas Dhuurniv.
source_quote: assured them he would remain in contact through Murssvayas Dhuurniv

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas refined her archery instincts and ability to fire through cover.
source_quote: Akritas refined her archery instincts, sharpening her ability to fire through cover

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim deepened his divine connection and gained a new radiant prayer.
source_quote: Bramgrim deepened his divine connection, gaining a steadier hand for maintaining his sacred wards and adding a new radiant prayer to his arsenal

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur mused about engineering a device to reshape his elemental attacks.
source_quote: Felkur mused aloud about engineering a device that could reshape the very nature of his elemental attacks

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur was identified as a figure of legend, a phantom thief no one could name.
source_quote: Felkur was now, technically, a figure of legend — a phantom thief no one could name

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur asked if he could sell the merchandise.
source_quote: could he sell the merchandise

subject: future battle
fact: Solom reminded the party that while this was a great victory, the battle was far from over.
source_quote: reminded them gravely that while this had been a great victory, the battle was far from over

subject: session date
fact: The session is titled 'Memorable Moments'.
source_quote: Date: Memorable Moments

subject: Poison Cloud
fact: A poisonous cloud filled the area, forcing everyone to make constitution saving throws.
source_quote: A poisonous cloud fills the area, forcing everyone to make constitution saving throws to resist the toxins

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: A Mezzaloth attempted to break the party's concentration on their spells but failed to hit Daein with its trident.
source_quote: A Mezzaloth attempts to break the party's concentration on their spells but fails to hit Daein with its trident

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: The Mezzaloth teleported to a new position to avoid Bramgrim's spirit guardians.
source_quote: The Mezzaloth teleports to a new position to avoid Bramgrim's spirit guardians

subject: Daein
fact: Daein struck the Mezzaloth, dealing damage and imposing a disadvantage on its next attack.
source_quote: Daein strikes the Mezzaloth, dealing damage and imposing a disadvantage on its next attack

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim took damage from the poison and lost his concentration on his spirit guardians.
source_quote: Bramgrim takes damage from the poison and loses his concentration on his spirit guardians

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim attempted to dispel the poisonous cloud using magic but failed the necessary spellcasting check.
source_quote: Bramgrim attempts to dispel the poisonous cloud using magic but fails the necessary spellcasting check

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim summoned a spiritual weapon as a bonus action.
source_quote: Bramgrim summons a spiritual weapon as a bonus action to prepare for further combat

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur remained focused on maintaining concentration on a vital task despite the chaotic environment.
source_quote: Felkur remains focused on maintaining concentration on a vital task despite the chaotic environment

subject: cloud dissolution
fact: Bramgrim struck the Mezzaloth with a bolt of fire, dissolving the poisonous cloud.
source_quote: Bramgrim strikes the Mezzaloth with a bolt of fire, dissolving the poisonous cloud

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas fired her Oathbow at the Shield Guardian, dealing steady damage.
source_quote: Akritas fires her Oathbow at the Shield Guardian, dealing steady damage

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: The Mezzaloth attempted to dispel the Wall of Force but failed.
source_quote: The Mezzaloth attempts to dispel the Wall of Force but fails

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: The Mezzaloth teleported away to safety after failing to dispel the Wall of Force.
source_quote: subsequently teleporting away to safety

subject: Daein
fact: Daein finished off the weakened Mezzaloth as it tried to regroup.
source_quote: Daein finishes off the weakened Mezzaloth as it tries to regroup

subject: Apprentice Arcanaloths
fact: Three Apprentice Arcanaloths emerged and began shouting for reinforcements.
source_quote: Three Apprentice Arcanaloths emerge and begin shouting for reinforcements

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim healed the Owlbear.
source_quote: Bramgrim heals the Owlbear

subject: Daein
fact: Daein used his second wind to recover from his wounds.
source_quote: Daein uses his second wind to recover from his wounds

subject: Fire Giants
fact: Two Fire Giants scaled the wall and joined the fray, fueled by rage over the party's perceived insults to their master.
source_quote: Two Fire Giants scale the wall and join the fray, fueled by rage over the party's perceived insults to their master

subject: Apprentice Arcanaloth
fact: An Apprentice Arcanaloth unleashed a fireball that engulfed the entire party.
source_quote: An Apprentice Arcanaloth unleashes a fireball that engulfs the entire party

subject: Party
fact: Everyone in the party managed to survive the fireball blast.
source_quote: though everyone manages to survive the blast

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: A new Mezzaloth arrived and used a wand of disintegration to finally destroy the Wall of Force.
source_quote: A new Mezzaloth arrives and uses a wand of disintegration to finally destroy the Wall of Force

subject: Fire Giants
fact: The Fire Giants attempted to slash at Daein but miraculously missed every single attack.
source_quote: The Fire Giants attempt to slash at Daein but miraculously miss every single attack

subject: party escape
fact: As the fifth round concluded, the party successfully teleported away from the battlefield.
source_quote: As the fifth round concludes, the party successfully teleports away from the battlefield

subject: Sporedome
fact: The party materialized in Sporedome, greeted by Solom Ned'razak and Xaven Tanor'this.
source_quote: The party materializes in Sporedome, greeted by Solom Ned'razak and Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Drow assistants
fact: Drow assistants took custody of the captured Fire Giant, Brandyr, for Solom's experimentation.
source_quote: Drow assistants take custody of the captured Fire Giant, Brandyr, for Solom's experimentation

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak explained that the ritual would take ten days.
source_quote: Solom Ned'razak explains that the ritual will take ten days

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak instructed the party to return to Hillsfar.
source_quote: and instructs the party to return to Hillsfar

fact: Solom Ned'razak stated he would remain in contact via Murssvayas Dhuurniv.
source_quote: Solom Ned'razak states he will remain in contact via Murssvayas Dhuurniv

fact: The party leveled up.

fact: Bramgrim gained advantage on concentration checks.
source_quote: with Bramgrim gaining advantage on concentration checks

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim gained the Word of Radiance cantrip.
source_quote: and the Word of Radiance cantrip

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur considered creating a mechanical device to modify his elemental attacks.
source_quote: Felkur considers creating a mechanical device to modify his elemental attacks

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas improved her archery skills, gaining the ability to ignore cover and fire effectively at close range.
source_quote: Akritas improves her archery skills, gaining the ability to ignore cover and fire effectively at close range

subject: Trident
fact: The Trident is the weapon wielded by the Mezzaloth.
source_quote: The weapon wielded by the Mezzaloth

subject: Oathbow
fact: The Oathbow was used by Akritas against the Shield Guardian.
source_quote: used by Akritas to strike enemies from a distance

subject: Wand of Disintegration
fact: The Wand of Disintegration was pressed against the Wall of Force and used to instantly destroy the barrier.
source_quote: pressed against the Wall of Force and used to instantly destroy the barrier

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: The Mezzaloth cast a sphere of poisonous yellow-green fog called Cloudkill.
source_quote: A sphere of poisonous yellow-green fog cast by the Mezzaloth

subject: Brandyr
fact: Brandyr is a Fire Giant captured by the party and handed over to Solom Ned'razak's Drow assistants.
source_quote: captured Fire Giant, Brandyr

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak is a Drow Archmage.
source_quote: A Drow Archmage who receives the party

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this is a Drow Alchemist who greets the party alongside Solom Ned'razak.
source_quote: A Drow Alchemist who greets the party alongside Solom Ned'razak

fact: The Owlbear was caught in the poisonous cloud and took damage.
source_quote: caught in the poisonous cloud and took damage

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear was healed by Bramgrim.
source_quote: before being healed by Bramgrim

subject: Spirit Guardians
fact: Protective spirits summoned by Bramgrim damaged the Mezzaloth.
source_quote: Protective spirits summoned by Bramgrim that damaged the Mezzaloth

subject: Spirit Guardians
fact: Bramgrim's concentration on Spirit Guardians was broken by poison damage from the Cloudkill.
source_quote: before Bramgrim's concentration was broken by poison damage from the Cloudkill

subject: Wall of Force
fact: A Wall of Force acted as an invisible, indestructible barrier that protected the party for five rounds.
source_quote: An invisible, indestructible barrier that protected the party for five rounds

subject: Mezzaloth dispel attempt
fact: The Mezzaloth attempted to dispel the Wall of Force.
source_quote: The Mezzaloth attempted to dispel it

fact: A wand of disintegration was used to destroy the Wall of Force.
source_quote: later a wand of disintegration was used to finally destroy it

subject: Mezzaloth Dispel Magic
fact: The Mezzaloth attempted to use Dispel Magic against the Wall of Force but failed.
source_quote: The Mezzaloth tried to use it against the Wall of Force but failed

subject: Bramgrim Dispel Magic
fact: Bramgrim attempted to use Dispel Magic to clear the Cloudkill but failed his spellcasting check.
source_quote: Bramgrim attempted it to clear the Cloudkill but also failed his spellcasting check

subject: Spiritual Weapon
fact: Bramgrim summoned a Spiritual Weapon, a floating spectral weapon, as a bonus action after his spirit guardians were lost.
source_quote: A floating spectral weapon summoned by Bramgrim as a bonus action after his spirit guardians were lost

subject: Fireball
fact: An Apprentice Arcanaloth cast a Fireball that engulfed the entire party.
source_quote: A massive explosion of flame cast by an Apprentice Arcanaloth that engulfed the entire party

subject: Fireball damage
fact: The Fireball dealt sixteen points of fire damage to each party member.
source_quote: dealing sixteen points of fire damage to each member

subject: Party survival
fact: All party members survived the Fireball blast.
source_quote: All party members survived the blast

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim selected the Word of Radiance cantrip upon leveling up.
source_quote: A divine cantrip newly selected by Bramgrim upon leveling up
